docs/artifactclean.html.title: ArtifactClean | Invex .NET Tools
docs/artifactclean.html.summary: ArtifactClean (artclean) artclean recursively removes bin and obj directories from a .NET workspace. By default, it restores the workspace afterward so it is ready for the next build. Installation dotnet tool install --global Invex.Tools.ArtifactClean Usage Run from the root of the workspace to clean: artclean Provide a root path to clean a different directory: artclean path\to\workspace Options Option Description -n, --no-restore Do not run dotnet restore after cleaning. -v, --verbose Show each deleted directory and detailed dotnet output. Warning ArtifactClean permanently deletes all bin and obj directories below the selected path. It skips symbolic links and junctions while traversing the directory tree.
